case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. JOHN MORROW

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-11-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-11-2019 CONTINUED TO OCT-08-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MORROW, JOHN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-25-2019
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100072295), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED OCT-11-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORROW, JOHN
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-08-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100085530)
